roadmap: pipeline-layers-ui-redesign / MR-1 — design-token foundation + dark-mode plumbing
scope: Walking skeleton: establish the global design-token layer (single Neobrutalist aesthetic, light) + an orthogonal Solarized .dark class, with a localStorage-persisted dark-mode preference applied before hydration (no flash). Refactor one visible surface (app-shell frame + breadcrumb stub) onto tokens and mount the dark-mode toggle in the org-view appearance panel. NO multi-aesthetic switcher (path-forward §9). Drives the RED vitest suite at frontend/app/theme/theme.test.tsx (9 cases) to GREEN.
design_ratified_as: docs/feature/pipeline-layers-ui-redesign/path-forward.md §5 (MR-1) + §9 (DECISION LOCKED — single Neobrutalist aesthetic + Solarized dark)

phases.name: Walking skeleton — token layer + dark-mode plumbing

steps.name: Implement theme token layer + dark-mode plumbing and wire it into the shell
steps.criteria: All 9 cases in frontend/app/theme/theme.test.tsx are GREEN (cd frontend && npx vitest run app/theme). readStoredMode/applyThemeClass/initThemeFromStorage/themeInitScript/useTheme implemented in frontend/app/theme/theme.ts; ThemeToggle renders a working switch; tokens.css carries real Neobrutalist-light values under :root/.theme-neobrutalist and Solarized-dark overrides under .dark. The pre-hydration init script is wired into Layout (frontend/app/root.tsx <head>) and the token sheet imported so first paint applies the default with no flash; the app-shell frame + a breadcrumb stub consume tokens; ThemeToggle is mounted in the org-view appearance panel (production call sites exist, not only tests). No __SCAFFOLD__ markers remain in frontend/app/theme (grep -r __SCAFFOLD__ frontend/app/theme is empty). Existing frontend tests stay green.

manual_review_gates: Deferred per-feature gates (Python acceptance / Elevator-Pitch demos / mutation / evolution finalize) — N/A or deferred for this per-MR frontend slice; see deliver/wave-decisions.md
deliver_dispatch_notes: Single OOP/standard crafter step. RED already authored in DISTILL; crafter performs GREEN + wiring + COMMIT. Acceptance gate is vitest (app/theme), not the deliberately-skipped Python SSR suite (UI-1). Do not run Phase 7 finalize — MR-1 is 1 of 8; finalize after MR-8.
